verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: By those [angels] lined up in rows
verse.verse_3: And those who recite the message,
verse.verse_5: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises.
verse.verse_6: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars
verse.verse_7: And as protection against every rebellious devil
verse.verse_8: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side,
verse.verse_9: Repelled; and for them is a constant punishment,
verse.verse_10: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness].
verse.verse_11: Then inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created men from sticky clay.
verse.verse_12: But you wonder, while they mock,
verse.verse_13: And when they are reminded, they remember not.
verse.verse_14: And when they see a sign, they ridicule
verse.verse_15: And say, "This is not but obvious magic.
verse.verse_16: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
verse.verse_18: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible."
verse.verse_19: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing.
verse.verse_20: They will say, "O woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense."
verse.verse_21: [They will be told], "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny."
verse.verse_22: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship
verse.verse_23: Other than Allah, and guide them to the path of Hellfire
verse.verse_24: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned."
verse.verse_25: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other?"
verse.verse_26: But they, that Day, are in surrender.
verse.verse_27: And they will approach one another blaming each other.
verse.verse_28: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right."
verse.verse_29: The oppressors will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers,
verse.verse_30: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people.
verse.verse_31: So the word of our Lord has come into effect upon us; indeed, we will taste [punishment].
verse.verse_32: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators."
verse.verse_33: So indeed they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment.
verse.verse_34: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals.
verse.verse_35: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant
verse.verse_36: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet?"
verse.verse_37: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers.
verse.verse_38: Indeed, you [disbelievers] will be tasters of the painful punishment,
verse.verse_39: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do -
verse.verse_40: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
verse.verse_41: Those will have a provision determined -
verse.verse_42: Fruits; and they will be honored
verse.verse_45: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring,
verse.verse_46: White and delicious to the drinkers;
verse.verse_47: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated.
verse.verse_48: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes,
verse.verse_49: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected.
verse.verse_50: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.
verse.verse_51: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth]
verse.verse_52: Who would say, 'Are you indeed of those who believe
verse.verse_53: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed?'"
verse.verse_54: He will say, "Would you [care to] look?"
verse.verse_55: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire.
verse.verse_56: He will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me.
verse.verse_57: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell].
verse.verse_58: Then, are we not to die
verse.verse_59: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished?"
verse.verse_60: Indeed, this is the great attainment.
verse.verse_61: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work.
verse.verse_62: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum?
verse.verse_63: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers.
verse.verse_64: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire,
verse.verse_65: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils.
verse.verse_66: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies.
verse.verse_67: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water.
verse.verse_68: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire.
verse.verse_69: Indeed they found their fathers astray.
verse.verse_70: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps.
verse.verse_71: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples,
verse.verse_72: And We had already sent among them warners.
verse.verse_73: Then look how was the end of those who were warned -
verse.verse_74: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
verse.verse_75: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders.
verse.verse_76: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction.
verse.verse_77: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]
verse.verse_78: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
verse.verse_80: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
verse.verse_81: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
verse.verse_83: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham,
verse.verse_84: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart
verse.verse_85: [And] when he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?
verse.verse_86: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allah you desire?
verse.verse_87: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds?"
verse.verse_88: And he cast a look at the stars
verse.verse_89: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill."
verse.verse_90: So they turned away from him, departing.
verse.verse_91: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat?
verse.verse_92: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak?"
verse.verse_93: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand.
verse.verse_94: Then the people came toward him, hastening.
verse.verse_95: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve,
verse.verse_96: While Allah created you and that which you do?"
verse.verse_97: They said, "Construct for him a furnace and throw him into the burning fire."
verse.verse_98: And they intended for him a plan, but We made them the most debased.
verse.verse_99: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me.
verse.verse_100: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous."
verse.verse_101: So We gave him good tidings of a forbearing boy.
verse.verse_102: And when he reached with him [the age of] exertion, he said, "O my son, indeed I have seen in a dream that I [must] sacrifice you, so see what you think." He said, "O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allah wills, of the steadfast."
verse.verse_103: And when they had both submitted and he put him down upon his forehead,
verse.verse_105: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
verse.verse_106: Indeed, this was the clear trial.
verse.verse_107: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,
verse.verse_108: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
verse.verse_110: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
verse.verse_111: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
verse.verse_112: And We gave him good tidings of Isaac, a prophet from among the righteous.
verse.verse_113: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself.
verse.verse_114: And We did certainly confer favor upon Moses and Aaron.
verse.verse_115: And We saved them and their people from the great affliction,
verse.verse_116: And We supported them so it was they who overcame.
verse.verse_117: And We gave them the explicit Scripture,
verse.verse_118: And We guided them on the straight path.
verse.verse_119: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations:
verse.verse_121: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
verse.verse_122: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants.
verse.verse_123: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers,
verse.verse_124: When he said to his people, "Will you not fear Allah?
verse.verse_125: Do you call upon Ba'l and leave the best of creators -
verse.verse_126: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers?"
verse.verse_127: And they denied him, so indeed, they will be brought [for punishment],
verse.verse_128: Except the chosen servants of Allah.
verse.verse_129: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
verse.verse_131: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
verse.verse_132: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
verse.verse_133: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers.
verse.verse_134: [So mention] when We saved him and his family, all,
verse.verse_135: Except his wife among those who remained [with the evildoers].
verse.verse_137: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning
verse.verse_138: And at night. Then will you not use reason?
verse.verse_139: And indeed, Jonah was among the messengers.
verse.verse_140: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship.
verse.verse_141: And he drew lots and was among the losers.
verse.verse_142: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy.
verse.verse_143: And had he not been of those who exalt Allah,
verse.verse_144: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected.
verse.verse_145: But We threw him onto the open shore while he was ill.
verse.verse_146: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine.
verse.verse_147: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more.
verse.verse_148: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time.
verse.verse_149: So inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?
verse.verse_150: Or did We create the angels as females while they were witnesses?"
verse.verse_151: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say,
verse.verse_152: " Allah has begotten," and indeed, they are liars.
verse.verse_153: Has He chosen daughters over sons?
verse.verse_154: What is [wrong] with you? How do you make judgement?
verse.verse_155: Then will you not be reminded?
verse.verse_156: Or do you have a clear authority?
verse.verse_157: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful.
verse.verse_158: And they have claimed between Him and the jinn a lineage, but the jinn have already known that they [who made such claims] will be brought to [punishment].
verse.verse_159: Exalted is Allah above what they describe,
verse.verse_160: Except the chosen servants of Allah [who do not share in that sin].
verse.verse_161: So indeed, you [disbelievers] and whatever you worship,
verse.verse_162: You cannot tempt [anyone] away from Him
verse.verse_163: Except he who is to [enter and] burn in the Hellfire.
verse.verse_164: [The angels say], "There is not among us any except that he has a known position.
verse.verse_165: And indeed, we are those who line up [for prayer].
verse.verse_166: And indeed, we are those who exalt Allah."
verse.verse_167: And indeed, the disbelievers used to say,
verse.verse_168: "If we had a message from [those of] the former peoples,
verse.verse_169: We would have been the chosen servants of Allah."
verse.verse_170: But they disbelieved in it, so they are going to know.
verse.verse_171: And Our word has already preceded for Our servants, the messengers,
verse.verse_172: [That] indeed, they would be those given victory
verse.verse_173: And [that] indeed, Our soldiers will be those who overcome.
verse.verse_174: So, [O Muhammad], leave them for a time.
verse.verse_175: And see [what will befall] them, for they are going to see.
verse.verse_176: Then for Our punishment are they impatient?
verse.verse_177: But when it descends in their territory, then evil is the morning of those who were warned.
verse.verse_178: And leave them for a time.
verse.verse_179: And see, for they are going to see.
verse.verse_180: Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe.
verse.verse_182: And praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
